channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UTIAMC] UTI Asset Management Company Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results and Consider Dividend Recommendation on 23/04/2026
item.description:
UTI Asset Management Company Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on the 23rd of April, 2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026. The Board will also discuss the recommendation of dividends and other general and business matters. This information is in compliance with Regulation 46 of the SEBI Listing Regulations and is available on the company's website.

  • UTI Asset Management Company Ltd to hold a Board meeting on 23/04/2026
  • Consideration and approval of audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026
  • Discussion on dividend recommendation
  • Meeting agenda includes other general and business matters

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UTI Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [UTIAMC] UTI Asset Management Company Ltd. to Close Trading Window for Q1 2026
item.description:
UTI Asset Management Company Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for the quarter ending 31st March, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Regulating, Monitoring and Reporting of Trading by Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives’. The trading window will be closed from 1st April, 2026 to 25th April, 2026 for designated persons and their immediate relatives. The Company's Board meeting is scheduled on 23rd April, 2026 to approve audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ending 31st March, 2026, consider recommendation of dividend, and discuss other general and business matters.

  • Trading window closure for the quarter ending 31st March, 2026
  • Closure from 1st April, 2026 to 25th April, 2026 for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Board meeting scheduled on 23rd April, 2026 to approve audited financial results
  • Consideration of dividend recommendation
  • Discussion of other general and business matters

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UTI Asset Management Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TRISHAKT] Trishakti Industries Invests INR 19.28 Crores in Capex Updates
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Trishakti Industries Ltd. has successfully undertaken a capital expenditure of approximately INR 19.28 Crores, including applicable taxes, for further strengthening its fleet, enhancing execution capabilities, and improving its ability to service large-scale projects across marquee clients in the infrastructure equipment rental segment. This strategic investment is expected to drive higher utilization levels, improved operating efficiencies, and stronger revenue visibility in the coming quarters, reinforcing its position as a fast-scaling player in the infrastructure rental space.

  • Trishakti Industries invests INR 19.28 Crores in infrastructure equipment rental segment
  • Strategic investment to strengthen the Company's fleet and enhance execution capabilities
  • Expected to improve ability to service large-scale projects across marquee clients
  • Increased capacity aimed at driving higher utilization levels and improved operating efficiencies
  • Investment to create long-term value for all stakeholders

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRISHAKTI ELECTRONICS & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Expansion

item.title: [SAVERA] Savera Industries Ltd Closes Trading Window for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Savera Industries Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for the year ending March 31, 2026, in accordance with the Code of Conduct (Insider Trading) under SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, are published. The date of the Board meeting to approve the audited financial results will be informed in due course. Connected and designated persons are advised not to trade in the securities of the company during this period.

  • Trading window closure for FY 2025-2026
  • Closure from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after results publication
  • Applies to connected and designated persons
  • Related to SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Board meeting to approve audited financial results in due course

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAVERA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BSL] BSL Ltd. Reports Zero Transfers in Special Window for Physical Shares
item.description:
BSL Ltd. has shared a report from its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited, regarding the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares. The report covers the period from 5th February 2026 to 4th March 2026. During this period, no requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected. The average time taken for processing requests was zero days, as there were no requests to process. The report does not provide information on the reasons for rejection as no requests were rejected during this period.

  • BSL Ltd. reported zero transfers for the period from 5th February 2026 to 4th March 2026
  • No requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during this period
  • The average time taken for processing requests was zero days
  • The report does not provide information on the reasons for rejection as no requests were rejected

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BSL LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [CHENNPETRO] Chennai Petroleum Corporation Ltd Announces Trading Window Closure
item.description:
Chennai Petroleum Corporation Ltd (CPCL) has announced the closure of the trading window for 'Insiders' from 1st April, 2026 to 48 hours after the Financial results for the Quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 are filed with exchanges. The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the above financial results is yet to be intimated.

  • CPCL announces trading window closure for insiders from 1st April, 2026
  • The closure will last till 48 hours after the Financial results for the Quarter and year ended 31st March, 2026 are filed with exchanges
  • The date of the Board Meeting for consideration of the financial results is yet to be informed
  • The announcement is in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulation, 2015
  • CPCL's Code for Prevention of Insider Trading in the Securities of CPCL is also being followed

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHENNAI PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [OMAXE] Omaxe Ltd Subsidiary Receives RERA Registration for 'METRO CITY P-2 A' Project in Lucknow
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Omaxe Ltd announced that its wholly owned subsidiary, Mis. Omaxe Garv Buildtech Private Limited, has received the RERA Registration Certificate for its project 'METRO CITY P-2 A' in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. The registration was granted by the Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority (U.P. RERA) and is valid till 09-10-2027. This approval enables the subsidiary to sale, transfer, or advertise the project, thereby strengthening the brand value and positively impacting the consolidated financial performance of the Company.

  • Omaxe Ltd's subsidiary received RERA Registration for 'METRO CITY P-2 A' project in Lucknow.
  • The project is a residential plot and caters to both domestic and international markets.
  • The approval is granted by Uttar Pradesh Real Estate Regulatory Authority (U.P. RERA).
  • The registration is valid till 09-10-2027 and enhances credibility, ensures timely delivery, and fosters trust with buyers.
  • This approval positively impacts the consolidated financial performance of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: OMAXE LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SACHEMT] Sacheta Metals Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
Sacheta Metals Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window from 01st April, 2026 until the end of 48 hours after the declaration of audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ending on 31st March, 2026. This decision is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by Insiders. Designated Persons and their immediate relatives are advised not to engage in any transaction involving dealing/trading in shares of the Company during this period.

  • Trading window closure from 01st April, 2026
  • Closure till the end of 48 hours after the declaration of audited standalone financial results
  • Decision in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Applies to Designated Persons and their immediate relatives
  • No transaction involving dealing/trading in shares of the Company during the closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SACHETA METALS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [EUPHORIAIT] Euphoria Infotech Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Euphoria Infotech (India) Ltd. has announced the closure of its trading window for all Designated Persons. This closure is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading, as per the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the half and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results will be communicated in due course.

  • Euphoria Infotech (India) Ltd. closes trading window for Designated Persons.
  • Closure is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.
  • Closure effective from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results.
  • The date of the Board of Directors' meeting to approve the Audited Financial Results will be communicated later.
  • Move aims to comply with SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Euphoria Infotech (India) Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RTFL] Real Touch Finance Ltd Approves ₹2.56 Crore NCD Issue & Writes Off ₹3.48 Crore Receivables
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Real Touch Finance Ltd has approved the issuance of ₹2.56 crore worth of unlisted, secured, 9.5% redeemable non-convertible debentures (NCDs) on a private placement basis. The company also approved the write-off of ₹3.48 crore worth of irrecoverable receivables. The NCDs will have a tenure of 3 years with a fixed coupon rate of 9.50% per annum, payable annually. The write-off represents approximately 12.05% of the company's total turnover of ₹28.89 crores. The company will continue to pursue recovery efforts for the written-off receivables where feasible.

  • Real Touch Finance Ltd approved the issuance of ₹2.56 crore NCDs
  • The NCDs will have a tenure of 3 years and a fixed coupon rate of 9.50% per annum
  • The company wrote off ₹3.48 crore worth of irrecoverable receivables
  • The write-off represents approximately 12.05% of the company's total turnover
  • The company will continue to pursue recovery efforts for the written-off receivables

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Real Touch Finance Ltd | Category: Investment
